task_completion.description: Locate and open the contact record for Elena Rostova.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vtiger CRM interface should display the contact details or edit screen specifically for 'Elena Rostova'.

task_completion.description: Update the contact's Title and Department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contact's Title field should show 'VP of Operations' and the Department field should show 'IT'.

task_completion.description: Enable Portal User access and set the support date range.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Portal User' checkbox must be checked (enabled), the 'Support Start Date' must be '2026-03-01', and the 'Support End Date' must be '2027-02-28'.

task_completion.description: Create a new ticket and link it to the contact.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ticket creation or detail screen showing 'Elena Rostova' selected in the Contact Name or related entity field.

task_completion.description: Set the ticket Title, Priority, and Status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket fields must show Title: 'VIP Onboarding - Elena Rostova', Priority: 'High', and Status: 'Open'.

task_completion.description: Add the required description to the ticket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket description text area must contain the exact text: 'Please schedule the VIP portal onboarding call.'

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Vtiger CRM web application in a browser, not terminal commands, scripts, or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Ensure the changes were actually saved in the CRM.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success notifications, or the read-only detail views of the contact and ticket showing the updated values, rather than just text typed into unsaved edit forms.

integrity.description: Ensure answers were not just typed into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be entered into the correct CRM form fields, not a notepad, text editor, or unrelated web page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Contact: Elena Rostova. Expected Contact Updates -> Title: 'VP of Operations', Department: 'IT', Portal User: Enabled (checked/1), Support Start Date: '2026-03-01', Support End Date: '2027-02-28'. Expected Ticket Details -> Title: 'VIP Onboarding - Elena Rostova', Priority: 'High', Status: 'Open', Description: 'Please schedule the VIP portal onboarding call.', Linked Contact: Elena Rostova.
